title: KillerToaster37s 3D Animated Tornado Pack
description: A Resource Pack That  Ads 3D Animated Textures to The items for The Tornado Mod (AKA) Weather2
body:
My Resource Pack Ads 3D Animated Textures to The items for The localized weather mod Mod (AKA) Weather2 and ProtoManly's Weather Mod

 

Details

 
The Siren sound is a Thunderbolt 1000

 

 

 

The Weather Forecaster is based off of a Military Radar

And The Weather Forecaster Has Custom Animated Icons

 

OptiFine Recommended!!!

ExtendPolyphonyLimit Recommended!!!

Showcase
